name: Whole-Wheat Granola
recipeInstructions:
This is 1/4 original recipe.
Mix first five ingredients in an electric mixer. Combine oil, honey, and orange juice in a separate bowl. Pour the liquid mixture over the dry ingredients and mix until everything is well combined. Spread evenly in a shallow pan. Bake at 250°F for 45 minutes. Stir in coconut and almonds, then bake for an additional 30 minutes. Cool before stirring in raisins.
Serving size: 227 calories  1 starch, 1 fruit, 2 fat exchanges.
Nutritional information: 27.9 grams carbohydrate, 4.7 grams protein, 11.9 grams fat, 4 grams fiber  98.4 milligrams sodium, 189.1 milligrams potassium, 0 cholesterol.
To reduce calories and fat, decrease the amount of coconut and oil by one-third.
